title: BodyPlan
description: Anatomical layout for a creature type. Defines which body zones exist, their hit probability weights, and the organ roster. Referenced by CombatantState.body_plan_id.

zones.description: Ordered list of body zone references with per-creature hit weights. Hit weights are normalised at runtime.

organs.description: Organs present in this body plan. Each organ is referenced by organ_id in tissue_layers.

vital.description: If true, damage to this organ triggers an immediate death effect.
